name: agents
description: Harness-agnostic agent operating modes for review closeout, watching, verifying, and carrying context across live work.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable agent roles and operating modes.
interface.longDescription: A portable pack of agent operating modes. Autoreview runs a structured code-review closeout helper and verifies accepted findings before fixes. Birdwatch turns an assistant into a live watcher: it observes logs, APIs, DB state, git state, and user-reported UX findings, then records evidence-backed discrepancies without mutating state unless asked.
defaultPrompt: Run autoreview on this branch before final.
Use autoreview on the latest commit.
Use birdwatch while I test this app.
Watch the backend, API, DB, and logs while I sweep this flow.
Keep an evidence-backed discrepancy log during this product test.
